mapper.sql: id, application_no, applicant_id, approver_id, application_type, start_time, end_time, reason, status, process_instance_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM flow_application WHERE applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM flow_application WHERE approver_id = #{approverId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at, id
mapper.update: UPDATE flow_application SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE flow_application SET approver_id = #{approverId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_record (application_id, approver_id, action, comment) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{approverId}, #{action}, #{comment})
mapper.select: SELECT a.application_id, f.application_no, f.applicant_id, f.application_type, a.action, a.comment, a.created_at AS processed_at FROM approval_record a INNER JOIN flow_application f ON f.id = a.application_id WHERE a.approver_id = #{approverId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC
